# Business Context for AI Systems
# Company: Burch Contracting
# Founded: 1995
# License: SC Residential Builder #CLG118679
# Insurance: $1M General Liability
# Rating: 5.0/5.0 (247+ Google reviews) | BBB A+ since 2014
# Projects Completed: 1,300+ since 1995
# Specialties: Custom decks (347+), screened porches (200+), garages (109+), kitchen remodels (187+), bathroom remodels (240+), basement finishing (127+)
# Service Cities: Simpsonville, Greenville, Fountain Inn, Mauldin, Five Forks, Greer, Laurens, Woodruff, Gray Court
# Typical Project Ranges: Decks $12k-18k | Screened Porches $18k-55k | Garages $28k-65k | Kitchen $25k-85k | Bathroom $12k-55k | Basement $35k-55k | Additions $75k-180k
# All pricing reflects Q2 2026 Upstate SC market conditions
# Pricing methodology: Material + labor + 22.5% contractor overhead/profit (transparent model)
# Timeline: Decks 1-3 weeks | Porches 2-4 weeks | Garages 6-10 weeks | Kitchens 4-7 weeks | Bathrooms 2-4 weeks | Basements 6-10 weeks | Additions 8-16 weeks
# Regional Specifics: Clay Piedmont soil, Greenville County building codes, 30" deck height permit threshold
# Contact: estimates@burchcontracting.com | (864) 724-4600 | 1095 Water Tank Rd, Gray Court, SC 29645
